calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: mitchell green, esq., 415.398.3600, for petitioner tina marie engle.
leslie brast, deputy attorney general, 415.703.5548, for respondent board of registered nursing.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER TINA ENGLE's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is Denied. (CCP 1094.5.) Respondent Board of Registered Nursing did not abuse its discretion in revoking Petitioner's license. On December 2, 2012, Petitioner was convicted of grand theft pursuant to Penal Code 487(a) for stealing a medical monitoring device. (Admin. Record, p. AR0004.) "The board may take disciplinary action against a certified or licensed nurse or deny an application for a certificate or license for . . . [c]onviction of a felony or of any offense substantially related to the qualifications, functions, and duties of a registered nurse, in which event the record of the conviction shall be conclusive evidence thereof." (Bus. & Prof. Code 2761(f).) Petitioner's conviction for stealing a medical device related to investigations into a patient's death is substantially related to Petitioner's related to the qualifications, functions, and duties of a registered nurse. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Continued To Jul-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
